creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Great job!

A few hints as reported by portclippy:


# USES block                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
USES                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
+USE_GNOME                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
+USE_SDL                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
# Configure block                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
GNU_CONFIGURE                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
+CONFIGURE_ARGS                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
-USE_GNOME                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
-USE_SDL                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
# CFLAGS/CXXFLAGS/LDFLAGS block                                                                                                                                                                                                       
LDFLAGS                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
-CONFIGURE_ARGS   

Also it would be nice if LIB_DEPENDS were sorted alphabetically. Would you like to make this changes?
